articles.title: These 2 Blockchains Dominated Transaction Fees Over Past 12 Months: Bloomberg Analyst
articles.description: Bloomberg crypto analyst Jamie Coutts declares that two blockchains have taken the lion’s share of transaction fees among all smart contract and Proof-of-Stake (PoS) blockchains over the last twelve months. The Ethereum and TRON networks accounted for a substantial 88% of the total transaction fees, with Ethereum leading at 57% and TRON following closely behind at 31%. Two...
